name: Cherry Tomato & Vegetable Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 Yam, peeled and cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the bell pepper, onion, and garlic in oil over medium heat until the peppers are tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
2. Add the potato and yam and cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add the tomatoes. Cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Gradually add the broth and continue to cook until the potatoes have softened and the skins have split on the tomatoes, about 15 minutes.
5. Add the peas and season with cayenne to taste. Simmer until heated through and serve hot.
